task: v149 preference local answer scope first stage

module_location: src/jarvis_lite/preferences.py exposes describe_preference_local_answer_note() and the active preference application validity check.
src/jarvis_lite/agent.py appends local answer notes from _answer_from_data() and memory fallback through _apply_preference_local_answer_note().
tests/test_preferences.py covers preference note validity, undo hints, history, conflicts and stable IDs.
tests/test_agent.py covers actual /ask local knowledge answers, memory fallback answers and LLM fallback context boundaries.
current_behavior: 0.143.0 local answer notes include the active prefapp ID, boundary, exact undo command, confirmation input and confirmed preferences.
The note helper has no answer-type input, so any future caller could append the same note without declaring which local answer path is using it.
Agent currently appends the same note to local knowledge answers and long-term memory fallback answers.
Ordinary LLM fallback context is separate and intentionally does not include the exact undo command.
similar_patterns: describe_preference_reply_context() keeps LLM fallback context separate from user-visible local answer notes.
JarvisAgent records route decision types such as knowledge/data-answer and memory-fallback/profile.
PROJECT-PLAN already names the next work as preference note display granularity and possible finer answer-type switch.
observation_report: The smallest next phase is an internal answer-type scope switch for local answer notes.
The helper should return a note only for explicitly supported local answer types, keeping unsupported or future answer paths from inheriting preference formatting by accident.
The note should show the answer type to make the audit trail clearer to users.
This phase should not add user-facing settings, natural-language preference writes, provider instructions, SearchRouter behavior, InnerBrain behavior, route changes or desktop execution changes.

key_questions.question: Which answer types should show the local preference note?
key_questions.answer: Only local knowledge answers and long-term memory fallback answers in this phase.

key_questions.question: What should unsupported answer types do?
key_questions.answer: Return no note, so future paths must opt in explicitly.

key_questions.question: Should this add a user setting?
key_questions.answer: No. This phase adds an internal scope switch and visible audit label only.

acceptance: describe_preference_local_answer_note(paths, "knowledge") shows answer type 本地知识库回答 when an active confirmation is valid.
describe_preference_local_answer_note(paths, "memory") shows answer type 长期记忆兜底回答 when an active confirmation is valid.
Agent /ask local knowledge answers and memory fallback answers include the matching answer type label.
LLM fallback context still does not expose local answer note labels or undo commands.
Version is bumped to 0.144.0 and docs/verification are updated.
